name: magento-codex-ai
description: Codex-first Magento 2 and Mage-OS prompt toolkit

scripts.test:promptfoo: npm run test:promptfoo:skills && npm run test:promptfoo:agents
scripts.test:promptfoo:skills: npx promptfoo@latest eval --config tests/skills/magento-plugin.yaml --config tests/skills/magento-db-schema.yaml --config tests/skills/magento-debug.yaml --config tests/skills/magento-observer.yaml --config tests/skills/magento-deploy.yaml --config tests/skills/magento-cli-command.yaml --config tests/skills/magento-test.yaml --config tests/skills/magento-api.yaml --config tests/skills/magento-hyva.yaml --config tests/skills/magento-infra.yaml --config tests/skills/magento-indexer.yaml --config tests/skills/magento-cache.yaml --config tests/skills/magento-amqp.yaml --config tests/skills/magento-sql.yaml --config tests/skills/magento-search.yaml --config tests/skills/magento-cron.yaml --max-concurrency 1
scripts.test:promptfoo:agents: npx promptfoo@latest eval --config tests/agents/magento-bug-triage.yaml --config tests/agents/magento-code-review.yaml --config tests/agents/magento-deployment.yaml --config tests/agents/magento-performance-auditor.yaml --config tests/agents/magento-api-builder.yaml --config tests/agents/magento-module-generator.yaml --config tests/agents/magento-indexer.yaml --config tests/agents/magento-cache.yaml --config tests/agents/magento-amqp.yaml --config tests/agents/magento-sql.yaml --config tests/agents/magento-search.yaml --config tests/agents/magento-cron.yaml --max-concurrency 1
